heroSubtext: GLUCOSE AI Experience Agents represent your brand across every channel—engaging customers, delivering product experiences, and driving outcomes autonomously across every touchpoint.
whySubtext: Your customers expect instant, personal, on-brand interactions at every touchpoint. GLUCOSE makes that possible—without scaling headcount, without losing brand control, and without waiting on engineering.
diffSubtext: Every capability of GLUCOSE is purpose-built so your brand shows up brilliantly for every customer—across every channel, every moment.
connectorsSubtext: GLUCOSE connects to your existing tools and platforms. Deploy across channels, integrate with enterprise systems, and maintain your current workflows.

connectorFeatures.title: One-Click Connectors
connectorFeatures.body: Connect third-party services to enhance your GLUCOSE environment — from e-commerce platforms to CRMs and messaging channels.

connectorFeatures.title: Categorized by Function
connectorFeatures.body: Browse connectors by type — Portfolio, Corpus, Tools, Users, Analytics, and Channels — to find exactly what you need.

connectorFeatures.title: Real-Time Status
connectorFeatures.body: See which connectors are active, pending configuration, or available to connect — all from a single management panel.

connectorFeatures.title: Request New Connectors
connectorFeatures.body: Need an integration we don't have yet? Request new connectors directly from the panel and our team will build it.

analyticsSubtext: Understand how your AI agents perform, uncover customer patterns, and optimize every interaction with real-time analytics and reporting.

analyticsFeatures.title: Key Metrics
analyticsFeatures.body: Track agent performance against critical KPIs — session volume, conversation depth, GLUCOSE Score, and customer satisfaction.

analyticsFeatures.title: Journey Explorer
analyticsFeatures.body: Visualize conversation flows and transition paths to understand how customers navigate through your AI agent experiences.

analyticsFeatures.title: Score Distribution
analyticsFeatures.body: Monitor quality scores across all conversations to identify trends, spot anomalies, and continuously improve agent behavior.

analyticsFeatures.title: Real-Time Alerts
analyticsFeatures.body: Get notified when agent performance drops below thresholds so you can intervene before it impacts customer experience.

technologySubtext: GLUCOSE runs on enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure—reliable, secure, and fully managed. You focus on experiences, not servers.
agnosticSubtext: GLUCOSE connects to your channels, enterprise systems, AI models, and cloud providers. No vendor lock-in—your stack, your choice.
glucoseCoreBody: GLUCOSE follows your playbooks, connects to your systems, and handles customer interactions—with precision, not scripts.
gmcBody: No-code interface for business users to configure, deploy, and monitor AI Experience Agents in real-time.
corpusBody: AI-ready knowledge repositories for accurate, contextual responses.
toolsBody: Connect to your existing systems. GLUCOSE acts. Your systems record.
archAnalyticsBody: Customer insights captured and synced back to your systems.
traditionalChatbotItems: Pre-programmed responses that break when conversations shift
Can only provide information, not take action
glucoseAgentItems: Goal-driven reasoning through complexity and edge cases
Executes tasks: books, updates, processes, resolves
Natural dialogue with empathy and brand awareness
devBody: Build agentic brand representation with brand and product experiences powered by GLUCOSE Agentic AI. Access our architecture documentation, JDL specification, and integration patterns.
ctaHeading: See what GLUCOSE can do for you
ctaBody: Discover how GLUCOSE can help your enterprise run autonomous brand experiences that reach every customer, in every moment that matters.
